title: Vibration absorbing aluminum alloy having large damping capacity and its manufacture
abstract:
PURPOSE: To manufacture a vibration absorbing Al alloy having large damping capacity and high strength by homogenizing an Al-Zn alloy at the m.p. or below, cold working the alloy to increase the dislocation, and carrying out heat treatment.
CONSTITUTION: An alloy consisting of 2W84wt% Zn and the balance Al is homogenized by heating at 250°CW the m.p. for 5minW100hr. The alloy is cooled and cold worked at ≥5% working rate to increase the dislocation, and by the hysteresis, large damping capacity and high strength are provided. The alloy is then heated at ≤250°C for 5minW100hr and cooled. The heat treatment facilitates bending, deep drawing, blanking or other forming. A vibration absorbing Al alloy having ≥6×10<sup>-3</sup>damping capacity Q<sup>-1</sup>can be obtd.
